# A+ Studio by Iprix Media - Complete Reference

> Comprehensive documentation of A+ Studio features, technical architecture, schema integrations, extension capabilities, and marketplace automations.

---

## 1. Technical Overview

### Web Platform
- **Framework**: Next.js (App Router)
- **Styling**: TailwindCSS, Vanilla CSS, Custom Monochrome Luxury Design
- **Database**: MongoDB (Mongoose Schema)
- **Security**: Stateless JSON Web Token cookie-based session management, isolated CSS scopes
- **API Services**: Cloudinary for image processing, Resend/SMTP for trigger-based transactional emails

### Chrome Extension (Manifest V3)
- **Architecture**: Separated content scripts, background workers, and popup UI
- **DOM Isolation**: Shadow DOM injection (`#aplus-floating-root`) prevents host website style conflicts on Meesho, Flipkart, and Amazon seller portals.
- **Autofill Mechanism**: Auto-detects input fields, textareas, and select elements; matches with template queries; parses and fills target attributes with real-time feedback loops.

---

## 2. Product Features & Modules

### AI Content Studio
- Generate high-scoring product titles, bullet points, meta descriptions, and search terms.
- Built-in character length limit enforcement for specific platforms.

### Chrome Extension Autofill
- Seamless floating action bar at the bottom of seller portal listing forms.
- Interactive modal previews for template mapping validation before applying values.

### PDF Label Analyser
- Bulk PDF parser for shipping labels.
- Automated carrier detection and split processing for Meesho and Flipkart labels.

### Image Maker
- Resizes, cleans, and optimizes product graphics to standard 1000x1000 pixels.
- Background removal capability for professional catalogs.

### Keyword Research
- Analysis of seed terms to extract search volume and difficulty metrics.
- Regional target suggestions based on Indian seasonal sales.

---

## 3. Subscription & Billing Plans

### Billing Frequency
- Subscriptions support both **Monthly** and **Yearly** billing cycles controlled globally.
- Yearly subscriptions are discounted by up to 60% relative to monthly pricing.

### Plan Tiers
- **Free**: 5 templates, 5 lifetime AI-powered listings, Solo team, basic email support.
- **Seller (₹99/mo)**: Unlimited templates, 100/mo AI-powered listings, 100 products, basic support.
- **Growth (₹199/mo)**: Unlimited templates, 500/mo AI-powered listings, Unlimited products, Team of 2, Flipkart beta, standard support.
- **Pro (₹299/mo)**: Unlimited templates, 1,500/mo AI-powered listings, Unlimited products, Team of 10, full AI content studio, priority support.
- **Agency (₹799/mo)**: Unlimited templates, 10,000/mo AI-powered listings, Unlimited products, Team Unlimited, client workspaces, dedicated support.

---

- **Organization**: Iprix Media
- **Service Name**: A+ Studio
